notes: Tags: first-principles, shipping-discipline, architectural-invariant. The 'first-principles' tag captures the sāṅkhya thread; the 'shipping-discipline' tag captures the yoga thread; the 'architectural-invariant' tag is the specific discipline content of the first thread. All three tags are doctrinally accurate. The 'first-principles' + 'architectural-invariant' pair is shared with 2.22 (essence-vs-implementation reading). The 'shipping-discipline' tag is shared with 2.30, 2.36, 2.37, 2.47. The cross-verse coherence is consistent: 2.39 explicitly authorizes the two-discipline framing that the rest of the chapter operates within. Cross-references to 2.47 (mature shipping discipline statement) and the chapter thesis's three-thread reading are doctrinally accurate.
